---
title: "4a - interactive visualization"
format: html
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r}
#| label: plotly-fruit #| echo: true

library(plotly)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)

```

```{r}

ds_long <- read_csv("1_datamanagement_files/fruits_long.csv")

```

```{r}

p <- ds_long |> 
  count(fruit, sort = TRUE) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(fruit, n), y = n, text = fruit)) + geom_col(fill = "steelblue") + coord_flip() + labs(x = "Fruit", y = "Count")

ggplotly(p)
```
